summary: Tested email notification features: welcome email on register, reset password email with origin_url, admin test-email endpoint, 403 for non-admin, email config card in admin dashboard, forgot password page sends origin_url. All 11 backend tests pass. Brevo API confirmed working (HTTP 201 Created logged). Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: 2 test users created during email notification tests (TEST_emailtest_* and TEST_resilience_* emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All email notification features fully working. Brevo HTTP 201 confirmed in backend logs. Welcome email fires on register, reset password email sends with origin_url link, admin test-email works (admin only, 403 for non-admin), email config card shows in admin dashboard with working 'Kirim Test Email' button. All previous features (products, auth, cart, admin CRUD) still passing from iteration 3.
brevo_verification: Backend logs show HTTP 201 Created for all Brevo API calls. Emails confirmed sent for: welcome, reset password, test email to admin
